title: An Act amending the charter of the town of Hopkinton to incorporate appointment powers of the board of library trustees

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Arena-DeRosa of Holliston, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 4292) of James C. Arena-DeRosa (by vote of the town) relative to appointment powers of the board of library trustees in the town of Hopkinton.  Municipalities and Regional Government.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Municipalities and Regional Government

related_entities.name: committee on Municipalities and Regional Government

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 07/29/2025 from 01:00 PM-05:00 PM in Gardner Auditorium
